MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-06-2003 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-04-2003 Continued To Mar-10-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
Off Calendar Mar-05-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JEROD HENDRICKSON, ESQ. OF MAC DONALD BECKMAN LLP, (415) 956-6488 FOR PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY, ANGELIQUE CASSIDY.
DEFENDANTS STACI FULLER AND RICH MORELLO, IN PROPRIA PERSONA DID NOT APPEAR.

RULING: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF ANGELIQUE CASSIDY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER-Granted, no opposition filed. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (REQ/301/SL) REPORTER: BELDON YEE, #2647

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie- Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Floyd Butler. Steven Adair Cassidy, Esq. represented Plaintiff Angelique Cassidy and there bein no appearance by Defendant Staci Fuller, the matter is ordered of the settlement conference calendar, request for jury demand is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-04-2003 Advanced From Feb-24-03 To Feb-11-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-11-2003 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Staci Fuller and Rich Marello, appearing in propria persona 239-4711, demurring party
Sara J. Paul, Esq. of MACDONALD BECKMAN 956-6488, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court overruled DEFENDANTs STACI FULLER and Rich Marello's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendants have 5 days leave to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/DR) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
